summary.en-US: On-device live radio transcription with karaoke highlighting

description.en-US:
Transcribes live radio streams in real time and highlights each word karaoke-style as it
is spoken — entirely on-device. Streaming speech recognition (sherpa-onnx) for English,
French and Mandarin, on-device summaries and live translation (Gemma 3 1B or a fully-open
alternative), playback via Media3, bundled stations plus Radio Browser discovery, and
SRT/TXT export.

Models are downloaded once on first use and kept on the device. The Gemma model is under
Google's non-free Gemma Terms of Use and downloads only after in-app consent; a fully-open
model can be used instead.
